description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 22 hrs 15 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 4 hrs 14 mins. His work was split across three projects, and his most-used languages were Python, TypeScript, and Markdown, followed by SQL. No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories were recorded.
